idea-plugin.name: YAML Visual Preview
idea-plugin.description: Renders YAML files as styled, readable HTML in a split-pane preview, similar to the built-in Markdown preview. YAML hierarchical structures are mapped to Markdown-like visual elements: headings, tables, and lists.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

  • Updated change-notes

1.0.1

  • Updated icon and screenshot

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Split-pane YAML preview with styled HTML rendering
  • YAML hierarchical structures mapped to headings, tables, and lists
